summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stage Calculator application. Backend APIs are 100% functional (9/9 tests passed). Frontend integration works excellently with successful stage calculations, 3D visualization, and navigation. Minor modal overlay issue in Component Manager delete functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay prevents delete button clicks - dialog backdrop intercepts pointer events

passed_tests: All 9 backend API endpoints working (upload, get, delete components, calculate indoor/outdoor, history)
Stage calculation with correct indoor/outdoor multiplier (1.2x for outdoor)
3D isometric visualization renders and updates correctly
Navigation between Calculator, Component Manager, History pages
Parts list display with accurate totals (price and weight)
Excel file upload functionality (tested via API)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay issue in Component Manager - the delete confirmation dialog backdrop is intercepting pointer events, preventing users from clicking the delete button. Consider adding force=true to click handlers or adjusting z-index/pointer-events CSS.
